title: Array assignments with --public-flat-rw
body:
### Verilog file
```
module arr_test ();

  logic din [0:15];

  array_test array_test_inst(.din(din));

endmodule


module array_test(
    input din [0:15]
);

endmodule
```
### Error

```
make[1]: Entering directory '/home/nndurj/Work/scratch/cocotb/examples/adder/tests'
verilator -cc --exe -Mdir sim_build -DCOCOTB_SIM=1 --top-module arr_test --vpi --public-flat-rw --prefix Vtop -o arr_test -LDFLAGS "-L `dirname /home/nndurj/Work/scratch/cocotb/examples/adder/tests/build/libs/x86_64/libvpi.so` -lvpi -lgpi -lcocotb -lgpilog -lcocotbutils"  /home/nndurj/Work/scratch/cocotb/examples/adder/tests/../hdl/adder.v /home/nndurj/miniconda3/envs/cocotb_verilator/lib/python3.7/site-packages/cocotb/share/lib/verilator/verilator.cpp
CPPFLAGS="-DVL_TIME_PRECISION_STR=1ps -std=c++11" make -C sim_build -f Vtop.mk
make[2]: Entering directory '/home/nndurj/Work/scratch/cocotb/examples/adder/tests/sim_build'
g++  -DVL_TIME_PRECISION_STR=1ps -std=c++11 -I.  -MMD -I/home/nndurj/softwares/verilator/include -I/home/nndurj/softwares/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=0 -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow       -c -o verilator.o /home/nndurj/miniconda3/envs/cocotb_verilator/lib/python3.7/site-packages/cocotb/share/lib/verilator/verilator.cpp
/usr/bin/perl /home/nndurj/softwares/verilator/bin/verilator_includer -DVL_INCLUDE_OPT=include Vtop.cpp > Vtop__ALLcls.cpp
g++  -DVL_TIME_PRECISION_STR=1ps -std=c++11 -I.  -MMD -I/home/nndurj/softwares/verilator/include -I/home/nndurj/softwares/verilator/include/vltstd -DVM_COVERAGE=0 -DVM_SC=0 -DVM_TRACE=0 -Wno-sign-compare -Wno-uninitialized -Wno-unused-but-set-variable -Wno-unused-parameter -Wno-unused-variable -Wno-shadow       -c -o Vtop__ALLcls.o Vtop__ALLcls.cpp
In file included from Vtop__ALLcls.cpp:3:0:
Vtop.cpp: In static member function ‘static void Vtop::_settle__TOP__1(Vtop__Syms*)’:
Vtop.cpp:135:9: error: invalid array assignment
         = vlTOPp->arr_test__DOT____Vcellinp__array_test_inst__din;
         ^
Vtop.cpp:137:9: error: invalid array assignment
         = vlTOPp->arr_test__DOT____Vcellinp__array_test_inst__din;
         ^
/home/nndurj/softwares/verilator/include/verilated.mk:182: recipe for target 'Vtop__ALLcls.o' failed
make[2]: *** [Vtop__ALLcls.o] Error 1
make[2]: Leaving directory '/home/nndurj/Work/scratch/cocotb/examples/adder/tests/sim_build'
/home/nndurj/miniconda3/envs/cocotb_verilator/lib/python3.7/site-packages/cocotb/share/makefiles/simulators/Makefile.verilator:44: recipe for target 'sim_build/arr_test' failed
```

May we assist you in trying to fix this yourself?
Yes
